He has a new and excellent book coming out, namely [How Africa Works: Success and Failure on the World's Last Developmental Frontier](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=326d952aa6b499c7665f3635a61242066974e39c4dc3f195b6b2baefbf2da931&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92221&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=cc95a71410fa2c457ca92c1079589151&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=374e12ff6e3ecc57f5b9fab71d69cc67), which I consumed eagerly. You probably know his earlier book [How Asia Works](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e33da507595a5c6150c5d045cebccffe31179d9087d55d0e5330508759cbb14c&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92221&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=3c939cce9b92e8937e98843acbecdde3&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=374e12ff6e3ecc57f5b9fab71d69cc67). So what should I ask him?
For additional context, here is the opening of [his home page](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=46c2a32a5417a3cfcb6ce2081643f54f7cd609878020a4c9a14001b4724c1261&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92221&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=9b033ffa0c045e480788daa5d74c0786&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9qb2VzdHVkd2VsbC5jb20vYWJvdXQv&email_id=374e12ff6e3ecc57f5b9fab71d69cc67) (no Wikipedia page?):
Hello. I am an author, journalist, public speaker and occasional university teacher. I am based much of the time in Cambridge. In the 2000s I restored and lived in a home in a still unspoiled area of central Italy (the photo at the top of the page is a view from the house).
So what should I ask him?
